content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Soldier and Bananas". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/546/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains three space-separated integers: k, n, w. Where k is the cost of one banana, n is the amount of money the soldier has, and w is the number of bananas the soldier wants to buy.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the amount the soldier needs to borrow, or 0 if he doesn't need to borrow anything.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Calculate the total cost of the bananas and compare it with the amount of money the soldier has.
